title: LOEWS CORPORATION ANNOUNCES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND ON COMMON STOCK
text: NEW YORK , Aug. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Loews Corporation (NYSE: L) announced today the declaration of the Company's quarterly dividend of $0.0625 per share of Common Stock, payable August 29, 2023 to shareholders of record as of the close of business on August 16, 2023. Loews Corporation is a diversified company with businesses in the insurance, energy, hospitality, and packaging industries.
